note: NEUTRAL. Software-prefetch upcoming rerank candidate rows (random gather into 3.9GB f32). No measurable change (within noise, slightly negative at 512/C=4000). Prefetch only helps with spare bandwidth to hide latency; under the 8-core batch the memory system is saturated, and rayon-over-queries already keeps many gathers in flight (MLP). Confirms the rerank gather is not a batch bottleneck.
